<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream.put(hexi::endian::native_to_little(packet_id));
        hexi::prefixed<4>(stream) << packet.username;
        hexi::prefixed<4>(stream) << packet.scores;
        hexi::null_terminated(stream) << packet.metadata;
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_packet(const NetworkPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    packet.serialise(stream);
    return buffer.to_vector();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer_sequence.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <span>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    NetworkPacket np;

    // Read packet_id
    uint32_t packet_id = 0;
    buffer.get(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
    np.packet_id = packet_id;

    // Read username with length prefix
    int username_len = 0;
    buffer.get(&username_len, sizeof(username_len));
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&username_len, sizeof(username_len));
    if (buffer.size() < static_cast<std::size_t>(username_len)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer underrun reading username"));
    }
    np.username.resize_and_overwrite(username_len, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
        buffer.get(strbuf, size);
        return size;
    });

    // Read scores count and vector
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    buffer.get(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    hexi::read_container(buffer, np.scores, score_count);

    // Read metadata as null-terminated
    const auto pos = buffer.find_first_of(std::byte{0});
    if (pos == buffer.npos) {
        np.metadata.clear();
    } else {
        np.metadata.resize_and_overwrite(pos, [&](char* strbuf, std::size_t size) {
            buffer.get(strbuf, pos);
            return size;
        });
        buffer += 1; // Skip null terminator
    }

    // Skip any remaining padding
    buffer += buffer.size();

    return np;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    PacketInfo pi;

    // Get packet_id via span
    const auto packet_id_ptr = buffer.data();
    uint32_t packet_id = *reinterpret_cast<const uint32_t*>(packet_id_ptr);
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&packet_id, sizeof(packet_id));
    pi.packet_id = packet_id;

    // Read username with length prefix
    int username_len = 0;
    buffer.get(&username_len, sizeof(username_len));
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&username_len, sizeof(username_len));
    if (buffer.size() < static_cast<std::size_t>(username_len)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer underrun reading username"));
    }
    const auto username_data = buffer.data() + sizeof(username_len);
    pi.username = { reinterpret_cast<const char*>(username_data), username_len };
    buffer += sizeof(username_len) + username_len;

    // Skip scores
    uint32_t score_count = 0;
    buffer.get(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    hexi::endian::le_to_native(&score_count, sizeof(score_count));
    buffer += score_count * sizeof(uint32_t);

    return pi;
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <span>
#include <cstdint>

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
    uint32_t footer;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    if (buffer.size() < (sizeof(uint16_t) + sizeof(uint32_t) + sizeof(uint32_t))) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small to contain header and footer"));
    }

    uint16_t message_type = 0;
    hexi::read(&message_type, sizeof(message_type), buffer.data());
    message_type = hexi::endian::le_to_native(message_type);

    uint32_t body_length = 0;
    hexi::read(&body_length, sizeof(body_length), buffer.data() + sizeof(message_type));
    body_length = hexi::endian::le_to_native(body_length);

    if (buffer.size() < (sizeof(uint16_t) + sizeof(uint32_t) + body_length + sizeof(uint32_t))) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer too small to contain entire message"));
    }

    hexi::skip(buffer, body_length);

    uint32_t footer = 0;
    hexi::read(&footer, sizeof(footer), buffer.data() + sizeof(message_type) + sizeof(body_length) + body_length);
    footer = hexi::endian::le_to_native(footer);

    return { message_type, body_length, footer };
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <cstddef>

const uint8_t* get_read_pointer(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data();
}

uint8_t* get_write_pointer(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    return buffer.data() + buffer.size();
}

struct BufferInfo {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo check_buffer_space(const std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo info;
    info.readable_size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = buffer.capacity() - buffer.size();
    return info;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    DataResult result;
    result.data_type = 0; // default in case an error occurs

    if (buffer.empty()) {
        return result;
    }

    result.data_type = buffer[0];

    if (buffer.size() < 5) { // 1 byte data_type + 4 bytes item_count
        return result;
    }

    hexi::buffer_read_adaptor buf_read(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(&buf_read);

    uint32_t item_count = 0;
    stream >> endian::le(item_count); // Read item_count with endian conversion

    const auto min_data_size = 1 + 4 + item_count * (result.data_type == 0 ? sizeof(uint32_t) : sizeof(float));
    if (buffer.size() < min_data_size) {
        return result;
    }

    if (result.data_type == 0) {
        result.int_items.resize(item_count);
        stream.get(result.int_items.data(), item_count * sizeof(uint32_t));
    } else {
        result.float_items.resize(item_count);
        stream.get(result.float_items.data(), item_count * sizeof(float));
    }

    return result;
}
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_sequence buffer_sequence(buffer);
    
    // Write the raw header
    buffer_sequence.write(&header, sizeof(header));
    
    // Serialise UserData using Hexi's stream write adaptor
    hexi::stream_adaptors::write_adaptor adaptor(buffer_sequence);
    data.serialise(adaptor);
    
    return buffer;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void write_to_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    char header_bytes[4];
    memcpy(header_bytes, &header, sizeof(header));
    buffer.write(header_bytes, 4);
    buffer.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferData {
    uint32_t header;
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
};

template<size_t block_size>
BufferData<block_size> read_from_dynamic_buffer(hexi::dynamic_buffer<block_size>& buffer, size_t data_length) {
    BufferData<block_size> result;
    char header_buf[4];
    buffer.read(header_buf, 4);
    memcpy(&result.header, header_buf, 4);
    result.data.resize_and_overwrite(data_length, [&](char* data, std::size_t size) {
        buffer.read(data, size);
        return size;
    });
    return result;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t element_count = 10>
void demonstrate_block_allocator_behavior() {
    hexi::block_allocator<element_count> allocator;
    
    // Initial allocation: takes from the free list (now has element_count - 1 free)
    auto t1 = allocator.allocate();
    
    // Deallocate: returns the block to the head of the free list
    allocator.deallocate(t1);
    
    // Subsequent allocation reuses the previously deallocated block
    auto t2 = allocator.allocate();
    
    // Additional allocations/deallocations to further demonstrate the cycle
    auto t3 = allocator.allocate();
    allocator.deallocate(t3);
    auto t4 = allocator.allocate(); // Should reuse t3's block
    
    // At this point, the free list has been pushed/popped multiple times
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<typename T>
void convert_from_big_endian_inplace(T& value) {
    value = hexi::endian::big_to_native(value);
}

template<typename T>
void convert_from_little_endian_inplace(T& value) {
    value = hexi::endian::little_to_native(value);
}

template<std::endian from, std::endian to, typename T>
void convert_endianness_inplace(T& value) {
    if constexpr(from != to) {
        switch(from) {
            case std::endian::native:
                value = (to == std::endian::big) ? hexi::endian::native_to_big(value) : hexi::endian::native_to_little(value);
                break;
            case std::endian::big:
                value = (to == std::endian::native) ? hexi::endian::big_to_native(value) : hexi::endian::big_to_little(value);
                break;
            case std::endian::little:
                value = (to == std::endian::native) ? hexi::endian::little_to_native(value) : hexi::endian::little_to_big(value);
                break;
            default:
                // Handle unknown endianness (no-op in this case)

#include <hexi/endian.h>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/detail/intrusive_storage.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
std::vector<uint8_t> preview_data_without_consuming(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    const auto read_ptr = storage.read_ptr();
    const auto read_size = storage.size();
    size_t bytes_to_copy = std::min(bytes_to_preview, read_size);
    std::vector<uint8_t> dest(bytes_to_copy);
    memcpy(dest.data(), read_ptr + storage.read_offset(), bytes_to_copy);
    return dest;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
struct BufferStatus {
    size_t readable_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferStatus<> check_buffer_status(const hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<1024>& storage) {
    BufferStatus<> status;
    status.readable_size = storage.size();
    status.free_space = 1024 * storage.block_count() - storage.write_offset();
    return status;
}

template<size_t block_size = 1024>
void reset_buffer(hexi::detail::intrusive_storage<block_size>& storage) {
    storage.clear();
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <vector>
#include <filesystem>

std::vector<uint8_t> read_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_read) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_read);
    file.read(destination.data(), destination.size());
    return destination;
}

std::vector<uint8_t> preview_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, size_t bytes_to_preview) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);
    std::vector<uint8_t> destination(bytes_to_preview);
    file.copy(destination.data(), destination.size());
    return destination;
}

void write_file_data(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_write);
    file.write(data.data(), data.size());
}

size_t get_file_size(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer file(file_path.string().c_str(), hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);
    return file.size();

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <span>
#include <array>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

using namespace detail;

uint32_t read_uint32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    buffer.open(hexi::file_buffer::buffer_read);

    std::array<std::byte, 4> target{};
    buffer.get(target.data(), target.size());

    return hexi::endian::le_to_native(static_cast<uint32_t>(target[0] << 24 |
                                  target[1] << 16 |
                                  target[2] << 8  |
                                  target[3]));
}

void write_uint32_to_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path, uint32_t value) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    buffer.open(hexi::file_buffer::buffer_write);

    const auto converted = hexi::endian::native_to_le(value);
    std::array<std::byte, 4> source{};
    source[0] = (converted >> 24) & 0xff;
    source[1] = (converted >> 16) & 0xff;
    source[2] = (converted >> 8)  & 0xff;
    source[3] = converted & 0xff;
    
    buffer.put(source.data(), source.size());
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/file_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/static_buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <type_traits>
#include <cstdint>
#include <filesystem>

int32_t read_int32_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    int32_t value = 0;
    
    if(buffer.size() < sizeof(value)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Chained buffer underrun: " + file_path.string()));
    }
    
    buffer.read(&value, sizeof(value));
    return hexi::endian::le_to_native(value);
}

float read_float_from_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path) {
    hexi::file_buffer buffer(file_path.string().c_str());
    float value = 0.0f;
    
    if(buffer.size() < sizeof(value)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Chained buffer underrun: " + file_path.string()));
    }
    
    buffer.read(&value, sizeof(value));
    return value;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
struct BufferInfo {
    size_t capacity;
    size_t current_size;
    size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo<> get_buffer_info(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, 1024>& buffer) {
    BufferInfo<> info;
    info.capacity = 1024;
    info.current_size = buffer.size();
    info.free_space = buffer.write_size();
    return info;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
void write_uint32_to_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer, uint32_t value) {
    buffer.write(&value, sizeof(value));
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
uint32_t read_uint32_from_buffer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer) {
    uint32_t value = 0;
    buffer.read(&value, sizeof(value));
    return value;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/static_buffer.h>
#include <cstdint>

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
const std::byte* get_read_pointer(const hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer) {
    return buffer.read_ptr();
}

template<size_t buffer_size = 1024>
std::byte* get_write_pointer(hexi::static_buffer<std::byte, buffer_size>& buffer) {
    return buffer.write_ptr();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/stream_base.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>

hexi::stream_state get_stream_state(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.state();
}

bool is_stream_good(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    return stream.state() == hexi::stream_state::ok;
}
```</answer>

    size_t buffer_size;
    bool is_empty;
};

StreamInfo get_stream_state_info(const hexi::pmc::stream_base& stream) {
    StreamInfo info = {};
    info.state = stream.state();
    info.buffer_size = stream.size();
    info.is_empty = info.buffer_size == 0;
    return info;
}
```</answer>

    const std::uint32_t len_big_endian = htonl(len_native);

#include <hexi/pmc/binary_stream_writer.h>

void write_container_to_stream(hexi::pmc::binary_stream_writer& writer, const std::vector<uint32_t>& container) {

    writer.write_fixed_int<4>(count);

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void write_data_to_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t value, const void* data, std::size_t length) {
    std::array<std::byte, 4> int_bytes{};
    memcpy(int_bytes.data(), &value, sizeof(value));
    buffer.write(int_bytes.data(), 4);
    buffer.write(data, length);
}

void read_data_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, uint32_t& value, void* data, std::size_t length) {
    std::array<std::byte, 4> int_bytes{};
    buffer.read(int_bytes.data(), 4);
    memcpy(&value, int_bytes.data(), sizeof(value));
    buffer.read(data, length);
}

struct BufferInfo {
    std::size_t size;
    std::size_t free_space;
};

BufferInfo get_buffer_info(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    return {
        buffer.size(),
        buffer.capacity() - buffer.size()
    };
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

void peek_data_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, void* data, std::size_t length) {
    buffer.copy(data, length);
}

template<typename T>
void peek_value_from_buffer(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, T& value) {
    buffer.copy(value);
}

bool peek_and_compare(hexi::pmc::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, const void* expected, std::size_t length) {
    std::vector<std::byte> target(length);
    buffer.copy(target.data(), length);
    const auto expected_data = expected;
    for (size_t i = 0; i < length; ++i) {
        if (target[i] != static_cast<std::byte>(*((const char*)expected_data + i))) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>

#include <vector>

using namespace hexi::pmc;

void skip_bytes_in_buffer(buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer, std::size_t bytes) {
    buffer.skip(bytes);
}

struct MessageHeader {
    uint16_t message_type;
    uint32_t body_length;
};

MessageHeader read_header_and_skip_body(buffer_adaptor<std::vector<std::byte>>& buffer) {
    MessageHeader header{};
    
    // Read fixed-size header (6 bytes)
    buffer.get(&header, sizeof(header));
    
    // Convert from little-endian to host byte order
    header.message_type = endian::le_to_native(header.message_type);
    header.body_length = endian::le_to_native(header.body_length);
    
    // Skip the body data
    skip_bytes_in_buffer(buffer, header.body_length);
    
    return header;
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_adaptor.h>

    buffer.conditional_clear();
}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <string_view>

void write_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream, const std::string& str) {
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint(str);
}

std::string read_string_prefixed_varint(hexi::binary_stream& stream) {
    std::string_view view;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint(view);
    return std::string(view);
}
```</answer>

#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstddef>

using namespace hexi::detail;

bool check_regions_overlap(const void* src, std::size_t src_len, const void* dst, std::size_t dst_len) {
    auto src_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(src);
    auto src_end = src_beg + src_len;
    auto dst_beg = std::bit_cast<std::uintptr_t>(dst);
    auto dst_end = dst_beg + dst_len;
    return src_beg < dst_end && dst_beg < src_end;
}

bool safe_memory_copy(void* destination, const void* source, std::size_t length) {
    if (check_regions_overlap(source, length, destination, length)) {
        std::memmove(destination, source, length);
    } else {
        std::memcpy(destination, source, length);
    }
    return true;
}
```</answer>

constexpr auto create_filled_array(std::uint8_t value) {

        target[i] = value;

}

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/buffer_sequence.h>
#include <hexi/concepts.h>
#include <hexi/dynamic_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/shared.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <concepts>
#include <span>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer(hexi::block_allocator<512>());
    hexi::buffer_sequence& seq = buffer;

    // Serialize packet_id as fixed 4-byte value
    const uint32_t id = hexi::endian::native_to_little(packet.packet_id);
    seq.write(&id, sizeof(id));

    // Serialize tags with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint<std::vector<std::string>> tags_adaptor(packet.tags);
    tags_adaptor.serialize(seq);

    // Serialize data with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint<std::string> data_adaptor(packet.data);
    data_adaptor.serialize(seq);

    return buffer.to_vector();
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    const auto data = buffer.data();
    size_t read_offset = 0;
    CompactPacket packet{};

    // Check buffer size for packet_id
    if(data.size() < read_offset + sizeof(uint32_t)) {
        HEXI_THROW(hexi::exception("Buffer underrun during packet_id deserialization"));
    }
    uint32_t id = 0;
    memcpy(&id, data + read_offset, sizeof(id));
    packet.packet_id = hexi::endian::little_to_native(id);
    read_offset += sizeof(id);

    // Deserialize tags with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint<std::vector<std::string>> tags_adaptor(packet.tags);
    tags_adaptor.deserialize(buffer, read_offset);

    // Deserialize data with prefixed_varint encoding
    hexi::prefixed_varint<std::string> data_adaptor(packet.data);
    data_adaptor.deserialize(buffer, read_offset);

    return packet;
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    hexi::dynamic_buffer buffer(hexi::allocators::default_allocator<>());

    // Write header with little-endian conversion
    const std::uint16_t header_little = hexi::endian::native_to_little(packet.header);
    buffer.write(&header_little, sizeof(header_little));

    // Write data with a 2-byte prefix
    const std::uint16_t data_len = hexi::endian::native_to_little(static_cast<std::uint16_t>(packet.data.size()));
    buffer.write(&data_len, sizeof(data_len));
    buffer.write(packet.data.data(), packet.data.size());

    // Write 16-byte padding filled with 0x00
    auto padding = hexi::fill<16>(0x00);
    buffer.write(padding.data(), padding.size());

    // Write footer with little-endian conversion
    const std::uint32_t footer_little = hexi::endian::native_to_little(packet.footer);
    buffer.write(&footer_little, sizeof(footer_little));

    // Convert to std::vector and return
    return buffer.to_vector();
}
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/pmc/buffer_base.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstddef>

class CustomBuffer : public hexi::pmc::buffer_base {
    std::vector<std::byte> data_;
    
public:
    // Returns the current size of the buffer
    std::size_t size() const override {
        return data_.size();
    }

    // Returns true if the buffer is empty (has no data to be read)
    [[nodiscard]]
    bool empty() const override {
        return data_.empty();
    }
    
    // Helper method to add data (for testing)
    void add_data(const void* source, std::size_t length) {
        const std::byte* bytes = static_cast<const std::byte*>(source);
        data_.insert(data_.end(), bytes, bytes + length);
    }
    
    // Helper method to clear data (for testing)
    void clear() {
        data_.clear();
    }
};
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/exception.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <hexi/stream_adaptors.h>
#include <hexi/null_buffer.h>
#include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
#include <hexi/allocators/default_allocator.h>
#include <ranges>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cassert>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;

    void serialise(auto& stream) const {
        stream.put(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
        int count = temperatures.size();
        stream.put(&count, sizeof(count));
        for (const auto& temp : temperatures) {
            float swapped = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(temp);
            stream.put(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
        }
        double swapped_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse<std::endian::native, std::endian::little>(pressure);
        stream.put(&swapped_pressure, sizeof(swapped_pressure));
    }

    void deserialise(auto& stream) {
        stream.get(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
        int count = 0;
        stream.get(&count, sizeof(count));
        temperatures.resize(count);
        for (int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
            float swapped = 0;
            stream.get(&swapped, sizeof(swapped));
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(swapped);
            temperatures[i] = swapped;
        }
        double swapped_pressure = 0;
        stream.get(&swapped_pressure, sizeof(swapped_pressure));
        hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(swapped_pressure);
        pressure = swapped_pressure;
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    hexi::block_allocator<> allocator;
    hexi::stream stream(&allocator);
    stream.set_write_buffer(hexi::allocators::default_allocator<>{});
    stream.serialise(data);
    return stream.buffer();
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::block_allocator<> allocator;
    hexi::stream stream(&allocator);
    stream.set_read_buffer(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    MeasurementData data;
    stream.serialise(data);
    return data;
}

struct SensorInfo {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::string sensor_name;
};

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    assert(buffer.size() > 0);
    hexi::stream stream(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    const char* name_ptr = nullptr;
    stream.get_view(&name_ptr, '\0');
    
    if (!stream.enforce_read_bounds(sizeof(uint32_t))) {
        return {0, ""};
    }

    uint32_t sensor_id = 0;
    stream.get(&sensor_id, sizeof(sensor_id));
    
    // Skip remaining data
    stream.skip(stream.size() - stream.read_offset());
    
    return {sensor_id, name_ptr ? name_ptr : ""};
}
